risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks are rated as High, indicating significant fragility in the operating environment that could undermine project implementation capacity and sustainability.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance... Rating at Approval: High... Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 01: High

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints in Fragile Context
risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation is rated as High risk, suggesting the implementing agencies (Aga-Khan Foundation Afghanistan and Afghan Credit Guarantee Foundation) face significant challenges in executing project activities in a fragile governance environment.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability... Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 01: High

risk_title: Early-Stage Implementation in High-Risk Political Environment
risk_summary: The project was only recently declared effective (April 9, 2024) and implementation arrangements are still being instituted, creating vulnerability to political instability and governance fragility in Afghanistan.
evidence_quote: The project was approved on March 27, 2024, and was declared effective on April 9, 2024. Implementation arrangements are being instituted (including meeting the requirements of the Ministry of Economy).
